title: D1 + D2 — Protected tokens additions across three skills + idempotency T5-array note in import/archive SKILL.md
description: Extend protected-tokens registry: archive adds pending_path, layer, team, personal, relevance_scope, proposed_reason, session_context, source_sessions, knowledge_scope_degraded; import adds proposed_reason, session_context, source_sessions; review adds relevance_scope, relevance_paths, narrow, broad, proposed_reason, session_context, knowledge_scope_degraded. Also add idempotency note to archive SKILL.md (L380-384) and import SKILL.md explaining that T5 source_sessions array form uses only `source_sessions[0]` in the sha256 hash (per extract-knowledge.ts:78 formula).

files.change: Add archive tokens (pending_path, layer, team, personal, relevance_scope, proposed_reason, session_context, source_sessions, knowledge_scope_degraded); add import tokens (proposed_reason, session_context, source_sessions); add review tokens (relevance_scope, relevance_paths, narrow, broad, proposed_reason, session_context, knowledge_scope_degraded)

Add explicit note: 'When source_sessions is an array (rc.5→rc.7 T5 form), only source_sessions[0] participates in the sha256({source_session: sourceSessions[0], type, slug}) idempotency hash at extract-knowledge.ts:78. Adding/removing additional sessions does NOT change the idempotency key.'
Add identical T5-array idempotency note as fabric-archive
Verify new protected tokens still present verbatim in skill body (most should already exist)
Update expected token sets per skill to include the new tokens

implementation: Read scripts/lint-protected-tokens.ts to understand SKILL_MCP_TOKENS shape and per-skill registry layout
Add the listed tokens to PROTECTED_TOKENS / per-skill keying in packages/shared/src/i18n/protected-tokens.ts

Draft idempotency T5-array note (canonical wording): 'NOTE: source_sessions can be either a single string or an array of strings. When array, only source_sessions[0] (the primary session) participates in the sha256 idempotency hash at packages/server/src/services/extract-knowledge.ts:78. The server formula is sha256({source_session: sourceSessions[0], type, slug}) — adding/removing additional array entries does not change the idempotency key, preserving rc.5→rc.7 compat.'
Insert note into archive SKILL.md near L380-L384; insert identical note into import SKILL.md near its idempotency section (grep for 'idempotency' in import template to find location)
Mirror to .claude and .codex; run lint-protected-tokens and three-mirror parity tests
Update lint-protected-tokens.test.ts to assert new token sets

reference.pattern: Protected token registry sync; idempotency contract documentation
reference.examples: Existing tokens like fab_extract_knowledge / .fabric/knowledge/ / MUST / NEVER follow per-skill keyed maps; idempotency formula at extract-knowledge.ts:78 is load-bearing

criteria: protected-tokens.ts adds 9 archive tokens / 3 import tokens / 7 review tokens to per-skill registry
Idempotency T5-array note present in archive AND import SKILL.md with consistent wording referencing extract-knowledge.ts:78 formula
scripts/lint-protected-tokens.ts exits 0 — all new tokens present verbatim in their respective skill bodies
Three-mirror byte-identity preserved for all 9 SKILL.md files
Server-side idempotency formula at extract-knowledge.ts:78 UNCHANGED (verify via test assertion in TASK-001)

rationale.chosen_approach: Documentation-only addition + token registry sync; no behavior change
alternatives_considered: Hoist idempotency formula docs to a shared reference document
Change server formula to hash all source_sessions entries (breaks rc.5→rc.7 compat)
Skip the note — rely on doctor hint to surface drift
decision_factors: Skills are the discovery surface for users
Protected token regression is a known failure mode (lefthook pre-commit)
rationale.tradeoffs: Adding protected tokens makes future i18n edits more constrained; tradeoff is regression prevention

manual_checks: Search archive SKILL.md for 'source_sessions[0]' or equivalent — verify idempotency note present
diff -q the three mirror pairs for each skill
